name: Loanmax Title Loans
description_short: Loanmax Title Loans at 4949 State Ave, Kansas City, KS 66102 in the Coronado neighborhood is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 276 reviews. Call +1 913-596-1077.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a vehicle title lending company. The company positions itself as helping working Americans access cash by leveraging the equity in their vehicles. They operate multiple locations across Nevada, Virginia, Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, and Michigan, with five locations in the Las Vegas area alone.

The company offers auto title loans—cash advances secured by a vehicle's clear title. Customers need only a vehicle, valid photo ID, and a clear vehicle title to apply. LoanMax advertises loans up to $10,000, with loan amounts determined by vehicle evaluation and ability to repay. They accept multiple payment methods including cash, checks, debit cards, and Western Union for loan payments. The Las Vegas location at 3276 N. Las Vegas Blvd operates Monday-Friday 10 AM–6 PM and Saturday 9 AM–2 PM.

LoanMax distinguishes itself through multi-state licensing and regulatory compliance. The company displays licenses and consumer disclosures for multiple states, including Virginia (operated under Fairfax Elite Financial Services, LLC), Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, and Michigan. They provide state-specific consumer rights pamphlets, rate schedules, and complaint procedures. The company also emphasizes that title loans should be short-term solutions and recommends credit counseling for customers with credit difficulties.

A critical limitation is the lack of transparent pricing information on the website. While they mention loan amounts up to $10,000, interest rates, APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing are not disclosed. Nevada residents receive a cautionary notice that title loans are for short-term needs only. The business model inherently carries high risk for consumers—defaulting results in vehicle repossession. This product is best suited only for those with immediate cash needs, vehicle equity, and the ability to repay quickly.
pros: Quick funding available for emergency cash needs with minimal documentation (vehicle, ID, clear title)
Loans up to $10,000, larger than typical payday loans
Multiple Las Vegas locations with convenient hours including Saturday availability
Licensed and regulated across multiple states with documented compliance and consumer disclosures
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash, checks, debit cards, and Western Union
Established company with 25+ years of operating history since 1990
Provides state-specific consumer information, rate schedules, and complaint procedures
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website—interest rates, APR, and fees are completely hidden from consumers
Title-based collateral means vehicle repossession risk if loan is not repaid, resulting in loss of transportation
Nevada residents explicitly warned that this is for short-term needs only, signaling high-cost emergency lending
Ability to repay is required but assessment criteria and lending standards are not transparent
No online application or funding process described—requires in-person visit to physical location
best_for: Workers with vehicle equity who need fast emergency cash for unexpected expenses and can repay within weeks
Individuals with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans and have no other borrowing options
People requiring small amounts of cash quickly (under $10,000) and willing to risk vehicle collateral
diagnosis: LoanMax Title Loans is best for workers with vehicle equity facing genuine emergencies who can repay within weeks and understand the collateral risk. The critical caveat is the complete absence of rate and fee transparency on their website—consumers cannot determine true cost before applying, and the Nevada regulatory warning confirms this is explicitly a high-cost, short-term product. This should only be considered after exhausting all other options.
services: Auto title loans up to $10,000 secured by vehicle equity
Payment processing via cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
In-person loan origination at physical locations
Multi-state lending across Nevada, Virginia, Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, and Michigan
Vehicle evaluation and loan amount determination
State-specific consumer disclosures and rate schedules
Customer support via phone (702-267-0359 for Las Vegas location; 877-511-CASH toll-free)
